---
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "extra.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    seal: false
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: '16:9'
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
##xaringan::inf_mr()
## For offline work: https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown/some-tips.html#working-offline
## Images not appearing? Put images folder inside the libs folder as that is the main data directory

library(tidyverse)
##library(readxl)
##library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
##library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```

class: slideblue

.size70[**Today's Agenda**]

<br>

.size45[.center[
Review our case studies to analyze strategies for preventing terrorism.
]]

<br>

<br>

<br>

.center[.size40[
  Justin Leinaweaver (Spring 2022)
]]

???

Today: Review the data and collaborate on ideas to visualize the data

For Wed: What other evidence do you need to make this argument? Go find it and bring to class!



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-green_blue_swirl_side.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle, center

.size60[**Final Paper Prompt**]

<br>

.size50[Propose a specific strategy for reducing political violence by non-state actors. 

This can be focused at any level of action (e.g. individual, group, states, etc.).]

???

### Any questions on the assignment?



---

class: middle, slideblue

.size70[**For Today**]

.size50[
Bring to class a recent example of an individual, group, state or group of states taking a specific action to stop or reduce the threat of terrorism. 

Be ready to explain what happened, the strategy being employed and some idea of how effective it appears to have been.
]

???

Let's hear your cases and discuss the strategies.



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-green_blue_swirl_side.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle, center

.size60[**Final Paper Prompt**]

<br>

.size50[Propose a specific strategy for reducing political violence by non-state actors. 

This can be focused at any level of action (e.g. individual, group, states, etc.).]

???

For Wednesday: Pick a single strategy and brainstorm a list of reasons why you have selected it.

Consider this the first draft of your paper outline.
